stemHtml: If a pilot wishes to dump fuel, ATC should…

options.a: Vector the aircraft to the nearest designated fuel dumping area and clear all traffic from the area.
options.b: Clear the aircraft to an area where fuel dumping can be conducted at least 2000 ft above any congested area.
options.c: Instruct the aircraft to dump fuel immediately on present heading to expedite landing.
options.d: Vector the aircraft to the nearest airport regardless of fuel dumping requirements.
